chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7649 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.32451/20202 2. For hearing of main case 11.02.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for the petitioner finalization of assessment is held up due to this petition. It is stated that the department may be directed to finalize the assessment vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondents department articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
